input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.2.5.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.2.5.5
            TITLE: only judges may ask questions. only team members who meet s.2.5.2 may answer questions.

            CONTENT:
            rule S.2.5.5: Only judges may ask questions. Only team members who meet S.2.5.2 may answer questions.
S.2.5.5 Only judges may ask questions. Only team members who meet S.2.5.2 may answer questions.

final_answer: Only judges may ask questions. Only team members who meet S.2.5.2 may answer questions.
